motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def smallestValue(self, n: int) -> int:
    factors = set()
    while n > 1:
        while n % 2 == 0:
            factors.add(2)
            n //= 2
        i = 3
        while i * i <= n:
            if n % i:
                continue
            factors.add(i)
            n //= i
            i += 2
    return n

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(n))
space complexity: O(log(n))
energy implications: LOW
